abort.already_configured: This Meridian account is already configured.
abort.login_expired: The login attempt expired. Start setup again to request a new code.
abort.initial_import_failed: The initial Meridian history import did not complete. Check the connection and start setup again; no login code or password was stored.
abort.no_accounts: No active Meridian electricity accounts were found for this login.
abort.reauth_entry_missing: The Meridian configuration entry could not be found.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The selected Meridian accounts were updated successfully.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Meridian. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.email_not_found: Meridian did not accept that email address.
error.invalid_auth: Meridian rejected the login attempt. Request a new code and try again.
error.invalid_data: Meridian returned account data Home Assistant could not use. Try again later.
error.otp_expired: The code has expired. Start setup again to request a new one.
error.otp_invalid: The code is incorrect. Check the email and try again.
error.otp_not_found: The code has already been used or was not found. Start setup again.
error.otp_too_many_attempts: Too many attempts were made. Start setup again to request a new code.
error.rate_limited: Meridian asked Home Assistant to wait before trying again. Please retry later.
error.select_account: Select at least one available Meridian account.

user.title: Connect Meridian Energy
user.description: Enter the email address used for MyMeridian. Meridian will email a six-digit login code. No password is requested or stored. After setup, Home Assistant refreshes the session automatically; another code is only needed if Meridian rejects or revokes that session.

data_description.email: The email address you use to sign in at app.meridianenergy.nz.

otp.title: Enter the Meridian login code
otp.description: Enter the six-digit code Meridian sent to {email}.

data_description.otp: Codes are single-use and expire quickly.

discovery_retry.title: Retry Meridian account discovery
discovery_retry.description: Authentication succeeded, but Home Assistant could not retrieve your Meridian accounts. Submit to retry without requesting or reusing a login code.

accounts.title: Choose Meridian accounts
accounts.description: Select the electricity accounts to import. Each selected account will have its own device, billing-period totals and statistics.

data_description.selected_accounts: You can change this later from Configure.

reconfigure.title: Choose Meridian accounts
reconfigure.description: Choose which accounts Home Assistant should import. Removing an account stops future updates and removes its device and entities, but preserves its existing long-term statistics.

data_description.selected_accounts: New accounts and grid-export metering are discovered automatically during regular topology refreshes.

reconfigure_discovery.title: Retry Meridian account discovery
reconfigure_discovery.description: Home Assistant could not retrieve the available Meridian accounts. Submit to try again.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect Meridian Energy
reauth_confirm.description: Meridian no longer accepts the stored session for {email}. Submit to request a new six-digit code.

progress.initial_import: Meridian is importing up to 90 days of electricity usage and available cost history. This can take several minutes. Keep this dialog open; setup will continue automatically when the import is complete.

create_entry.default: Meridian Energy is connected. Home Assistant will refresh the stored session automatically; a new emailed code is only required if Meridian invalidates it.

cannot_connect.message: Unable to reach Meridian. Home Assistant will try again automatically.

invalid_auth.message: Meridian no longer accepts the stored session. Reauthenticate the integration.

invalid_data.message: Meridian returned invalid electricity data. Home Assistant will try again automatically.

rate_limited.message: Meridian asked Home Assistant to wait before trying again.
